text:
I'm sorry, I made a typo in the How-To-Repeat section:

-cd /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/wxgtk28-unicode; make install clean
+cd /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/wxgtk26-unicode; make install clean

Thanks.
--
